title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
